heroHeadline: 213 Combat Engagements on Day 1,499; Russia Posts Zero Net Gains in March — First in 2.5 Years
heroSubtitle: Ukraine's General Staff reports 213 combat clashes on Day 1,499 — a sharp surge in Russian assault tempo; British intelligence calls the current situation the most favorable for Ukraine in 10 months; Russia recorded zero net territorial gains in March 2026 (first such month since October 2023), Ukraine recaptured ~9 sq km; cumulative Russian losses reach ~1,301,260; Russia fired 4 ballistic missiles at Kharkiv (1 injured), struck Sumy shopping center (4 injured), Kherson minibus (5 injured), and killed 1 in Kyiv region; Ukraine struck Kirovske airfield in Crimea; Trump-Ukraine peace process paused as Iran war consumes US diplomatic bandwidth
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
